strengths: 20 years of technical depth across infrastructure, full-stack systems, and real-time platforms; proven ability to architect and scale complex systems (Dunnhumby's millions-of-requests microservices, Optilyz's pricing optimization)

Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing through workshops, open-source contributions (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and engineering craftsmanship practices
Currently embedded in AI infrastructure work at re:cinq with hands-on experience in MCP frameworks and agentic workflows; demonstrates active engagement with cutting-edge AI tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or business outcomes; AI experience limited to 6 months of infrastructure work rather than the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' required
Lacks advanced degree in AI/ML field (Master's or PhD); background is primarily software engineering craftsmanship, not AI/ML research or strategy

No evidence of director-level strategic advising, cloud product roadmapping, or enterprise customer engagement at scale; career shows strong technical execution but limited strategic decision-making visibility

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI products or strategic platform experience
Absence of formal AI/ML graduate education
Deep technical foundation and proven infrastructure expertise

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical breadth and engineering discipline across 20 years, with particular strength in infrastructure and scalable systems. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—his current engagement is limited to 6 months of AI infrastructure tooling. The absence of an AI/ML advanced degree (preferred qualification) and lack of director-level strategic or customer-facing advisory experience create material gaps for this director-level strategic AI role. His profile aligns more closely with Staff Engineer positions in AI infrastructure than with a principal-level strategist advising on cloud and AI differentiation.
